---
pagetitle: "Michael J. Moody"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:3rem; padding:2rem 5vw; width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; min-height:calc(100vh - 64px);">

  <div style="flex:1; min-width:0;">
    <p>I am an incoming Physics PhD student at the University of Delaware. I recently completed undergraduate studies in physics and mathematics at the University of Maryland, Baltimore County.</p>
    <p>My research interests lie broadly in mathematical physics, open quantum systems, quantum information, quantum speed limits, and the use of geometric and analytic methods in quantum dynamics. I am especially interested in problems where physical intuition can be sharpened through rigorous mathematical structure.</p>
    <p>I am currently working on problems related to observable dynamics in open quantum systems, with emphasis on coherent and dissipative contributions to quantum speed limits.</p>
    <hr style="border:none; border-top:1px solid #ddd; margin:1.5rem 0;">
    <p>
      <a href="mailto:mjmoody@udel.edu">mjmoody@udel.edu</a><br>
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ihH4Bn8AAAAJ&hl=en">Google Scholar</a><br>
      <a href="https://github.com/mj-moody">GitHub</a><br>
      CV <span style="color:#999; font-size:0.85em;">(not yet complete)</span>
    </p>
  </div>

  <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:35vw; padding-right:4vw; box-sizing:border-box;">
    <img src="files/photo.png" style="max-height:calc(100vh - 120px); max-width:100%; width:auto; height:auto; display:block;">
  </div>

</div>
```
